verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: For the accustomed security of the Quraysh -
verse.verse_2: Their accustomed security [in] the caravan of winter and summer -
verse.verse_3: Let them worship the Lord of this House,
verse.verse_4: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.
